what_was_requested: ETAP 2: Return Skewness Reversion experiment - validate, publish, and backtest cf_return_skew feature integration with baseline strategy
what_was_done: 1. Validated cf_return_skew custom feature (48-period rolling skewness of 5m returns, negated for contrarian signal). 2. Published cf_return_skew to feature registry. 3. Built feature dataset to include cf_return_skew column. 4. Cloned baseline strategy (active-signal-v1) to candidate-return-skew-v1. 5. Saved version 2 with cf_return_skew added to both signals: long entry requires cf_return_skew > 1.0 (fear dominant = bullish), short entry requires cf_return_skew < -1.0 (greed dominant = bearish). 6. Ran preflight check (passed, no blocking issues). 7. Executed full-history backtest (2021-03-24 to 2026-03-20). 8. Compared against baseline run 20260407-194505-36c2a53d. 9. Recorded results in research memory with REJECT verdict.
